final_prompt.prompt:
Design a premium minimalist logo wordmark for an architecture and interior design brand.

Style/medium: Minimalist geometric wordmark; timeless European design-bureau aesthetic; calm luxury editorial feel
Composition: Clean spacing; refined typographic layout with subtle custom letter details
Subject: Uppercase wordmark "BAU" — sharp, precise typography with refined geometric character
Scene/backdrop: Neutral / empty background
Lighting/mood: Modern, sophisticated, precise, high-end
Color palette: Monochrome — black and ivory
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): BAU
Constraints:
  Flat vector logo identity
  Suitable for architecture, interior design, and construction brand
Avoid: Cliché house icons, tools, gradients, playful effects, decorative ornaments
